narrative:
Maple Heights City has 15,603 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 2.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 42.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 39.9 percentage points.
